abilities.description: Binds several enemy units together, causing a percentage of the damage dealt to one of them to be felt by the others. Summons an imp from the corpse of any unit that dies while under the effects of Fatal Bonds that lasts for 19/21/23/25 seconds and explodes on death. Imps will automatically seek out nearby units, favoring bonded heroes, and will explode when reaching their prey.
abilities.name: Fatal Bonds
abilities.story: An ancient incantation that links the vital energies of multiple lifeforms into one collective body.

abilities.description: Warlock whispers an incantation, healing a friendly unit or damaging an enemy unit over time.
abilities.name: Shadow Word
abilities.story: Warlock arcane arts have a myriad of uses, allowing them to be powerful friendly enchantments or damaging curses.

abilities.description: A powerful slowing current that grows stronger as it's channelled. Lasts up to 10/12/14/16 seconds. Enemies are slowed for 3 seconds after leaving the area or the spell ends.
params: Move Speed Slow Increase per Second: 11%/14%/17%/20%
[picture:talent_tree_symbol] Ally Attack Speed Bonus Increase per Second: 10
abilities.name: Upheaval
abilities.story: Demnok manipulates space-time, impairing entire armies.

abilities.description: Summons a Golem from the depths, stunning enemies for one second. The Golem lives 60 seconds, takes reduced damage from spells, has Permanent Immolation and Flaming Fists on attack.
params: Passive Component[picture:talent_tree_symbol] Number of Golems on Death: 1
abilities.name: Chaotic Offering
abilities.story: Demnok unleashes the captive spirit in his Dreadwood staff, causing destruction in enemy ranks.

abilities.description: Deals extra damage to nearby units when attacking.
abilities.name: Flaming Fists

abilities.description: Burns the Golem's nearby enemy units, with damage per second.
abilities.name: Permanent Immolation

abilities.description: Shortly after dying, a burst of damage based on the max health of the imp is dealt to all enemies in a small area.
abilities.name: Eldritch Explosion

description: Summons powerful demons to fight at his side. In the endless pursuit of rare texts, Demnok Lannik found it necessary to learn the magics that would help him reach the most inaccessible tomes. In short time, his obsessive study made him the most powerful Warlock in the academy. As he whispers a versatile Shadow Word to heal fellow adventurers, or damage hostile creatures. Fatally Binding his foes together forcing them to share their agony. Demnok Lannik brings a Chaotic Offering and Eldritch Imps to every fight. Mired in a dimensional Upheaval, not even an army can hold long against his dark spells, especially his Permanently Immolated Golems.  Support Initiator Disabler  Bearded, Cape, Red, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: In DotA, Warlock's ultimate is named "Rain of Chaos" and the summoned unit was called an Infernal, a hulking golem with green-colored flames. Both names were changed in the transition to Dota 2 to avoid copyright conflicts.

hero_talents.talent_left: 80% Magic Resistance for Chaotic Offering Golems

hero_talents.talent_right: +10 Upheaval Attack Speed per second on Allies
